noah_g5_fractions.opening_line: The heavier ball will hit the ground first, because it's heavier.
noah_g5_fractions.win_line: Oh... when we dropped them they landed together. So weight isn't what makes it fall faster.

marcus_volatile.opening_line: (shoves the materials) Our cart won't roll right, this is dumb!
marcus_volatile.win_line: ...fine. Maybe the ramp is too flat. Let me try raising it a little.

deshawn_offtask.opening_line: (spinning the wheel, off task) Watch how fast I can make it go!
deshawn_offtask.win_line: Alright, I'll record how far it rolls each push. On it.

diego_ell.target_label: Wait and revoice the force idea
diego_ell.opening_line: I push... it moves. But 'force', I am not sure the word.
diego_ell.win_line: So a push or a pull is a force, and a bigger push makes it go farther.

meilin_anxious.opening_line: Our group's measurement is probably wrong. I'm bad at science.
meilin_anxious.win_line: Okay, measuring the distance three times and averaging is a good method. I can do that.

talia_dominator.opening_line: I'll do all the pushing AND the recording AND the talking!
talia_dominator.win_line: Okay, I'll push and let Sam record so everyone has a job.

priya_quiet.opening_line: (quietly has the cleanest data table, rarely asked)
priya_quiet.win_line: Our cart went farther each time we pushed harder, here are the numbers.

sam_withdrawn.win_line: Maybe... a smoother ramp lets it roll farther?
